purpose: The CLOSED COVER of design aspects every active profile must address. Each aspect is `emitted` (a deterministic conformance predicate runs against the rendered surface) or a declared `deferred` (+ defer_reason). A profile that omits a roster aspect reddens, exactly like an undeclared file. At the SPINE stage nothing renders yet, so all aspects are `deferred`; each flips to `emitted` in the slice that mechanizes its predicate.

aspects.defer_reason: token-only at spine; token_only_color + contrast predicates land with the conformance runner
on_scale_type predicate lands with the conformance runner
grid_multiple + density_band predicates land with the conformance runner
radius_band + elevation_material predicates land with the conformance runner
motion_bounds predicate lands with the first interactive component
page_manifest + grouping facts land in D-SHELL-2
page_manifest + grouping facts land in D-SHELL-2

judgment/receipt aspects — D-SHELL-4 generalizes; receipts already committed per-slice per MF1
